{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=Atticus
|pkmn=Muk
|type1=Poison
|img=Atticus Muk Adventures.png
|epnum=PASV20
|epname=
|desc={{p|Muk}} is Atticus's second known Pokémon. It was first used as part of a trap for {{Scarlet}} and [[Nemona]], causing them to pass out. It then helped carry the two to Atticus's quarters. Later, during 
Atticus's battle with Scarlet, it used its poison to impair Scarlet's vision. It battled Scarlet's {{p|Floragato}} before losing to her {{p|Armarouge}}.

Muk's only known move is {{m|Sludge Wave}}.}}

{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=Atticus
|pkmn=Skuntank
|type1=Poison
|type2=Dark
|img=Atticus Skuntank Adventures.png
|epnum=PASV21
|epname=
|desc={{p|Skuntank}} is Atticus's third known Pokémon. It was first used to battle {{Scarlet}} as she raided the [[Navi Squad's Base]]. It later fought Scarlet's {{p|Tarountula}} and poisoned it before being switched out by a {{m|Circle Throw}}. Later, it defeated Scarlet's {{p|Armarouge}} before losing to her {{p|Palafin}}.

Skuntank's known moves are {{m|Toxic}}, {{m|Bite}}, and {{m|Night Slash}}.}}
